headline: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Beats Q1 Estimates and Reaffirms Full-Year Outlook, Stock Rises After Hours
summary: First Solar (FSLR) beat Q1 EPS estimates and reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance, driving shares up 0.8% after hours on strong margin expansion.

raw.headline: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Beats Q1 Estimates and Reaffirms Full-Year Outlook, Stock Rises After Hours
raw.summary: First Solar (FSLR) beat Q1 EPS estimates and reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance, driving shares up 0.8% after hours on strong margin expansion.

headline: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Solar panel manufacturer First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23.6% year on year to $1.04 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $5.05 billion at the midpoint came in 3.2% below analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $3.22 per share was 8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: First Solar, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Reaffirms Guidance
summary: PHOENIX, April 30, 2026--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) (the "Company"), America’s leading PV solar technology and manufacturing company, today announced financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 and reaffirmed its 2026 guidance.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider First Solar (FSLR) After Multi Year Share Price Surge
summary: Wondering whether First Solar at around US$190 a share still offers value, or if the easy gains are already behind it? This article breaks that question down in plain terms. The stock has pulled back over the last week and month, with 7 day and 30 day returns of 2.8% and 3.4% declines. It still shows a 50.6% return over the past year and 158.9% over five years. Recent attention on First Solar has centered on its role in the broader semiconductor and solar supply chain, as investors reassess...
